name: context-merger
description: Merge multiple files and folders into a single, structured text file for LLMs, code reviews, or documentation.

contextMerger.disableFileTypeFiltering.description: Include all file types and ignore common/additional file extension filtering.

contextMerger.additionalFileTypes.description: Extra file extensions to include in addition to the built-in common code types (for example: .svg).

contextMerger.ignoredFilesFolders.description: File/Folder names to skip while collecting files (in .gitignore format)

contextMerger.skipExtraBlankLines.description: Remove blank lines from file content before merging.

contextMerger.removeComments.description: Remove common comments for supported languages (JS/TS/PHP/Python and similar syntax families).

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
